prompt: Refactor OrderService.java to follow our Java 8 coding conventions.

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final keyword
No checked exceptions in method signatures (no throws clause with checked types)
No for/while loops — all collection processing uses streams
Methods that may not find a result return Optional instead of null
No method exceeds ~15 lines of logic; long methods are split into focused helpers
No Java 9+ features (no List.of, var, records, sealed classes, Stream.toList())
